label: 边内拆分
description: 把一个区域按「边缘格 / 内部格」拆成两张 0/1 region。对每个有效格（非零）查其 connectivity 邻接（默认 4-邻接，上下左右），若存在越界或邻格非有效则判为边缘格，否则判为内部格。edge 与 inner 互斥、二者并集等于区域全部有效格。可用于「边缘高密度、内部低密度」的两档差异填充：把 edge / inner 分别接到 region_random_fill 并配不同 density 即可复刻自然装饰里的边缘聚集效果。仅产 edge/inner 两张掩码，不含概率与语义。
description-en: Splits a region into edge cells and inner cells as two 0/1 masks. For each valid (non-zero) cell it checks its connectivity neighbors (default 4-connectivity: up/down/left/right); if any neighbor is out of bounds or non-valid the cell is an edge cell, otherwise an inner cell. edge and inner are mutually exclusive and their union equals all valid cells of the region. Useful for two-tier differential fill (dense edges, sparse interior): wire edge / inner into region_random_fill with different densities. Emits only the edge/inner masks, no probability or semantics.
icon: 深色背景上一个填充方块，最外圈一层格子用亮色高亮表示边缘带，内部格子用较暗的另一色表示内部带，边/内分带意象，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 输入区域
inputs.description: 0/1（或多值）区域网格；有效格为非零格。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 (or multi-valued) region grid; valid cells are non-zero.

inputs.name: connectivity
inputs.label: 邻接度
inputs.description: 判定邻接的方向数：4=上下左右（默认，与老 fillEdge 一致），8=含对角。
inputs.description-en: Neighbor connectivity for edge detection: 4 = up/down/left/right (default, matches legacy fillEdge), 8 = include diagonals.

outputs.name: edge
outputs.label: 边缘格
outputs.description: 与输入同形状的 0/1 掩码，边缘有效格=1，其余=0。
outputs.description-en: 0/1 mask matching the input shape; edge valid cells = 1, others = 0.

outputs.name: inner
outputs.label: 内部格
outputs.description: 与输入同形状的 0/1 掩码，内部有效格=1，其余=0。
outputs.description-en: 0/1 mask matching the input shape; inner valid cells = 1, others = 0.

outputs.name: edgeCount
outputs.label: 边缘格数
outputs.description: 判定为边缘的有效格数。
outputs.description-en: Number of valid cells classified as edge.

outputs.name: innerCount
outputs.label: 内部格数
outputs.description: 判定为内部的有效格数。
outputs.description-en: Number of valid cells classified as inner.
